faqs.question: What spider species are most common in North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: North Merrick residents most frequently encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders (daddy longlegs), wolf spiders, and occasionally yellow sac spiders. While most are harmless, they can multiply quickly and create unsightly webs throughout your home. Our technicians identify the species and apply targeted treatments for effective elimination.
